utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes description explicitly covering physical and mental health and provides a cost (€330/month). Fully specified. 
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides description indicating home contents coverage and a cost (€90/month). Fully specified. 
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides description and cost (€115/month). Fully specified. 
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan includes a service with description and cost (“Included”). Fully specified. 
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly (€535) and annual (€6420) costs. Fully specified. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named items that appear in the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). I located each of these exact names in their respective ground-truth sections and extracted the associated ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan in primary_health_coverage.physical_health has rating 6; PrimeHome Premium Coverage in property_protection.home_content has rating 6; PrimeTravel Premium Plan in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance has rating 6. The additional service '2-Day Physical & Mental Health Assessment' is not listed in the ground-truth ratings, so it is not included.
